item.title: Funding of petrochemicals industry highly concentrated among few financial institutions
item.description: Banks and investors have a ‘vested interest’ in profitability and long-term continuity of the sector, says the Center for International Environment Law
item.dc:creator: Fiona McNally

item.title: International net zero standard suggests prioritising emissions reductions over reporting
item.description: Draft ISO incorporates equity and justice into standard setting, proposing different corporate pathways for different markets
item.dc:creator: Sustainable Views

item.title: Biodiversity investing: different by design
item.description: An impact strategy focused on biodiversity lowers exposure to megacap technology names that dominate global indices
item.dc:creator: Sustainable Views

item.title: Keep the door open: virtual shareholder meetings risk removing accountability
item.description: Reducing the rights of investors is not likely to encourage more investment
item.dc:creator: Sustainable Views

item.title: SBTi to focus on implementation as it launches new standard
item.description: Investors say this move should increase their confidence in corporate climate targets
item.dc:creator: Sustainable Views

item.title: Fashion companies urged to treat heat as a supply-chain risk
item.description: High temperatures in garment-producing regions impact human rights and supply-chain resilience
item.dc:creator: Sustainable Views

item.title: Anthropic’s IPO could rewrite AI sustainability disclosure rules
item.description: Questions should be asked about the physical infrastructure behind frontier AI
item.dc:creator: Sustainable Views

item.title: EU investors launch framework to tackle ‘engagement washing’
item.description: Investors are using engagement as a justification for retaining companies in their portfolios that are controversial from an ESG perspective, report says
item.dc:creator: Sustainable Views

item.title: Are investors still holding TotalEnergies accountable on climate?
item.description: Environmental organisations have reported the French energy major to financial regulators over greenwashing risks towards investors
item.dc:creator: Sustainable Views
